trans-unit.source: A module to add a blog on your web store.
trans-unit.target: Modul til at tilføje blog på din side .

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this module ?
trans-unit.target: Er du sikker på du vil slette dette modul ?
Indstillinger for dias i Creative slider

trans-unit.source: If you select a slider from Creative slider, please switch off the Prestablog's slideshow on the right side.
trans-unit.target: Hvis du vælger en slider fra Creative slider, skal du slå Prestablogs slideshow fra i højre side.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while delete news.
trans-unit.target: En fejl opstod under sletning af nyheder.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while delete categorie.
trans-unit.target: En fejl opstod under sletning af kategori.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while delete antispam question.
trans-unit.target: En fejl opstod under sletning af antispam spørgsmål.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change status of news.
trans-unit.target: En fejl opstod under ændring af status af nyheder.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change status of slide.
trans-unit.target: En fejl opstod under ændring af status af slide.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change status of antispam question.
trans-unit.target: AEn fejl opstod under ændring af status af antispam spørgsmål.

trans-unit.source: Sorry, your file must be png/jpg/jpeg/gif.
trans-unit.target: Désolé, votre fichier doit être du format png/jpg/jpeg/gif

trans-unit.source: Sorry, your file was not uploaded. Your image needs to be less than
trans-unit.target: Désolé, votre fichier n'a pas été uploadé. Votre image doit faire moins de

trans-unit.source: You must activate at least one language
trans-unit.target: Du skal vælge mindst et sprog

trans-unit.source: You must choose at least one categorie
trans-unit.target: You must choose at least one categorie

trans-unit.source: The url rewrite must be specified
The content or introduction must be specified
An error occurred while add object.
trans-unit.target: En fejl opstod ved tilføjelse af et objekt.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while upload image.
trans-unit.target: En fejl opstod under overførsel af billede.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while update object.
trans-unit.target: Der opstod en fejl under opdatering af objekt.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change status of custom articles list.
trans-unit.target: Der opstod en fejl under ændring af status for brugerdefinerede artikel liste.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while change random status of custom articles list.
trans-unit.target: Der opstod en fejl under ændring af tilfældig status for brugerdefineret artikelliste.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while delete object.
trans-unit.target: Der opstod en fejl under sletning af objekt.

trans-unit.source: The field %1$s is not a correct.
The file is too large. Maximum size allowed is: %1$d kB. The file you're trying to upload is: %2$d kB.
trans-unit.target: Filen er for stor. Den maksimalt tilladte størrelse er: %1$d kB. Den fil, du forsøger at uploade, er: %2$d kB.

trans-unit.source: No existing the module's default "en" mails folder.
Error extract the module's default "en" mails folder.
Restore the module's default "en" mails folder successfull.
trans-unit.target: Gendannelse af modulets standard mail-mappe "en" lykkedes.

trans-unit.source: No existing the sitemap folder for %1$s
Error creating the sitemap folder for %1$s.
trans-unit.target: Error creating the sitemap folder for %1$s.

trans-unit.source: The folder %1$s not have the write permissions.
trans-unit.target: The folder %1$s ingent have the writing permissipås.

trans-unit.source: Refresh this page to enter again on the configuration of module.
trans-unit.target: Opdater denne side to enter again på the cpåfiguratipå of module.

trans-unit.source: Please add your employee account to the list of authors before editing your profile
trans-unit.target: Please add your employee account to the list of authors before editing your profile

trans-unit.source: The actual configuration of your sizes are settle to :
Add your articles on home's frontpage
trans-unit.target: Tilføj dine artikler på hjemmesidens forside

trans-unit.source: The slide will be displayed in the center column of the home page of your shop.
trans-unit.target: Denne slide vil blive vist i midter kolonnen på din shop's home page..

trans-unit.source: The slide will be displayed in the top of first page articles list of blog.
trans-unit.target: Dette slide wvil blive vist på toppen of blog's første side artikel list.

trans-unit.source: If enabled, the title of the slide will be displayed on the front.
trans-unit.target: Hvis aktiveret, vises titlen på sliden på forsiden.

trans-unit.source: The classic comment system (on the left of your page) and its options cannot be applied to facebook comments (on the right of your page).
trans-unit.target: The classic comment system (on the left of your page) and its options cannot be applied to facebook comments (on the right of your page).

trans-unit.source: This feature will redirect %1$s to this url with a redirect 301
trans-unit.target: This feature vil redirect %1$s to this url with a redirect 301

trans-unit.source: Your antispam reply is not correct.
trans-unit.target: Your antispam reply is ingent correct.

trans-unit.source: Your name cannot be empty or inferior at 3 characters.
trans-unit.target: Your name caningent be empty or inferior at 3 characters.

trans-unit.source: Your comment cannot be empty or inferior at 5 characters.
trans-unit.target: Your kommentar caningent be empty or inferior at 5 characters.

trans-unit.source: Make sure the url is correct.
Make sure to validate the captcha.
For the popup to appear constantly, turn it to 0
trans-unit.target: Hvis du vil have popuppen til at blive vist konstant, skal du sætte den til 0

trans-unit.source: Feature disabled on the demo mode
trans-unit.target: Feature disabled på the demo mode

trans-unit.source: Please select a picture to crop.
trans-unit.target: Please select a billede to crop.

trans-unit.source: Please select a crop region then press submit.
trans-unit.target: Please select a crop region then press submit.

trans-unit.source: full picture for description category list
trans-unit.target: Fuld billede for beskrivelse af kategori list

trans-unit.source: Add a popup to your categorie :
trans-unit.target: Add a popup to your category :

trans-unit.source: This position is already taken for this language
trans-unit.target: This position is already taken for this language

trans-unit.source: Be carefull ! Select only Articles exportation on your WordPress.
trans-unit.target: Be carefull ! Select only Articles exportation on your WordPress.

trans-unit.source: The XML file in the configuration is not locate in the ./download directory
trans-unit.target: The XML file in the configuration is ingent locate in the ./download directory

trans-unit.source: You must upload a new import XML file.
trans-unit.target: You must upload a new import XML file.

trans-unit.source: The file is not an XML content
trans-unit.target: The file is ingent an XML content

trans-unit.source: Chose the language where you want to import this xml
trans-unit.target: Choose the language where you want to import this xml

trans-unit.source: Current XML import file in configuration :
trans-unit.target: Current XML import file in configuration :

trans-unit.source: To moderate comments, go on the front office at bottom of each posts.
trans-unit.target: To moderate kommentarer, go to the front office at bottom of each posts.

trans-unit.source: If your multistore functionnality is on, please select one shop to configure your blog.
trans-unit.target: If your multistore functionnality is on, please select one shop to configure your blog.

trans-unit.source: Leave blank to use the default template %1$s
trans-unit.target: Leave blank to use the default template %1$s

trans-unit.source: This option will randomize your list.
trans-unit.target: This option vil randomize your list.

trans-unit.source: Only allow the author and super admin to edit their own news
trans-unit.target: Only allow the author and super admin to edit their own news

trans-unit.source: Activate the display of author and author's link page on the news.
trans-unit.target: Aktiver visning af forfatter og forfatterens linkside på nyhederne.
Vis forfatter på siden med kategorier

trans-unit.source: Display the author link on the news page
trans-unit.target: Display the author link on the news page

trans-unit.source: Display the "About" block at the bottom of the news
trans-unit.target: Display the "About" block at the bottom of the news

trans-unit.source: Only registered users can publish a comment
trans-unit.target: only registered users can publish a kommentar

trans-unit.source: Inform admin by email for a new comment
trans-unit.target: Inform admin by email for a new kommentar

trans-unit.source: You can manage comments directly on facebook application.
trans-unit.target: You can manage kommentars directly på facebook application.

trans-unit.source: Add a facebook accounts ID for beeing comments moderators.
trans-unit.target: Add a facebook account ID to become kommentar moderator.

trans-unit.source: This action will delete the moderator :
trans-unit.target: This action vil delete the moderator :

trans-unit.source: Limit url number per xml file
trans-unit.target: Limit url number per xml file

trans-unit.source: This action will erase all current sitemaps for the shop %1$s
trans-unit.target: This action vil erase all sitemaps from the blog %1$s

trans-unit.source: Add a "Cron task" to reload this url:
trans-unit.target: Add a "Cron task" to reload this url:

trans-unit.source: It will automatically generate your XML Sitemaps.
trans-unit.target: It vil automatically generate your XML Sitemaps.

trans-unit.source: This debug is expected to reveal the errors after an installation or upgrade.
trans-unit.target: Denne debug forventes at afsløre fejl efter en installation eller opdatering.

trans-unit.source: It is based on the knowledge base of customer feedback, bugs or simple errors.
trans-unit.target: Det er baseret på viden fra kundernes feedback, bugs or simple errors.

trans-unit.source: Change the order of categories with a simple drag&drop.
Add this shortcode directly in your tpl
trans-unit.target: Tilføj denne shortcode direkte i din tpl

trans-unit.source: Use this link in your menu configuration:
trans-unit.target: Brug dette link i din konfiguration:

trans-unit.source: Be careful, if you change the URL after being referenced, you'll lost all your work. Please use with caution
trans-unit.target: Vær forsigtig, hvis du ændrer URL'en, efter at du er blevet henvist til den, mister du alt dit arbejde. Brug venligst med forsigtighed

trans-unit.source: The popup will be displayed in the blog's home page. For displaying the popup in articles or categories, please go directly to the creation of articles and categories
trans-unit.target: Popup'en vil blive vist på bloggens startside. For at få vist popup'en i artikler eller kategorier skal du gå direkte til oprettelsen af artikler og kategorier

trans-unit.source: You must add a new category before deleting this one !
trans-unit.target: Du skal tilføje en ny kategori, før du sletter denne kategori !

trans-unit.source: For delete parent category, you should delete all child before !
trans-unit.target: For at slette hovedkategori, bør du Slette alle under kategorier først !

trans-unit.source: Supports the count of items in the categories recursive children.
trans-unit.target: Supports the count of items in the kategorier recursive children.

trans-unit.source: Top of first page of category
Full size picture width for category
trans-unit.target: Fuld størrelse billede width for kategori

trans-unit.source: Full size picture height for category
trans-unit.target: Fuld størrelse billede height for kategori

trans-unit.source: Only if blog link is activated
trans-unit.target: Kun hvis blog link er aktivret

trans-unit.source: The general rewrite option (Friendly URL) of your PrestaShop is not activate.
trans-unit.target: The general rewrite option (Friendly URL) of your PrestaShop is ingent activate.

trans-unit.source: You must enable this general option to it works.
trans-unit.target: You must enable this general option for this to work.

trans-unit.source: Enable only if your server allows URL rewriting (recommended)
trans-unit.target: Enable only if your server allows URL rewriting (recommended)

trans-unit.source: Show breadcrumb in all blog pages
trans-unit.target: Show the breadcrumb trail on the blog pages

trans-unit.source: Show thumbnail image in article page
trans-unit.target: Show thumbnail image in artikel page

trans-unit.source: Rss link for categories in the news page.
trans-unit.target: Rss link for kategorier in the nyheder page.

trans-unit.source: Add a new tab with associated blog posts directly in your product page
trans-unit.target: Add a new tab with associated blog posts directly in your product page

trans-unit.source: Width of thumbnail in the product list linked
trans-unit.target: Width of thumbnail in the product list linked

trans-unit.source: Number of characters to search on related products for article edited
trans-unit.target: Number of characters to search on tilsvarende products for artikel edited

trans-unit.source: Number of results in search off related products for article edited
trans-unit.target: Number of results in search off tilsvarende products for artikel edited

trans-unit.source: Number of characters to search on related articles for article edited
trans-unit.target: Number of characters to search på tilsvarende artikels for artikel edited

trans-unit.source: Number of results in search off related articles for article edited
trans-unit.target: Number of results in search off tilsvarende artikels for artikel edited

trans-unit.source: Always show comments in article edition
trans-unit.target: Always show kommentars in artikel editipå

trans-unit.source: This option may penalize your SEO.
trans-unit.target: Denne mulighed may penalize your SEO.

trans-unit.source: Advance search in the top of results, with filter of categories
trans-unit.target: Avanceret søgning i i toppen af resultaterne, med filter af kategorier

trans-unit.source: Order of the blocks on columns
trans-unit.target: Rækkefølge of the blocks på columns

trans-unit.source: You will leave this page. Are you sure ?
trans-unit.target: Du er ved at forlade denne side. Er du sikker ?

trans-unit.source: This Antispam option can protect you to comments of spammers robots.
trans-unit.target: This Antispam optipå can protect you from spam.

trans-unit.source: Will random in the comment form.
trans-unit.target: vil random in the kommentar form.

trans-unit.source: Delete all sitemap xml for this shop
trans-unit.target: Delete all sitemap xml for this blog

trans-unit.source: Use master sitemap to regroup all news :
trans-unit.target: Use master sitemap to regroup all nyheder :

trans-unit.source: All sitemaps can be crawled individually for %1$s store :
trans-unit.target: All sitemaps can be crawled individually for %1$s store :

trans-unit.source: You must choose at least one language !
trans-unit.target: You must choose at least poe language !

trans-unit.source: In order to display the slides from Creative Slider anywhere you want in the article, please paste the shortcode of the slide you want from the Creative Slider module in your content.
trans-unit.target: In order to display the slides from Creative Slider anywhere you want in the article, please paste the shortcode of the slide you want from the Creative Slider module in your content.

trans-unit.source: Configure the max length in the general configuration of the module theme.
trans-unit.target: Indstil størrelsen på resuméet under Konfiguration > Kategori > Beskrivelsesstørrelse.

trans-unit.source: Add a popup to your article :
trans-unit.target: Tilføj en popup til din artikel :

trans-unit.source: Then the blue icon "?" related to the module
trans-unit.target: Derefter vises det blå ikon "?" tilsvarende to the module

trans-unit.source: In order to improve our translation system, or if you have any request
trans-unit.target: In order to improve our translation system, or if you have any request

trans-unit.source: Please feel free to contact us via the
trans-unit.target: Please feel free to contact us via the

trans-unit.source: You cannot reply to a comment that does not exist or is not approved.
trans-unit.target: Du kan ikke svare på en kommentar, der ikke findes eller ikke er godkendt.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while saving the reply.
trans-unit.target: Der opstod en fejl under gemningen af svaret.

trans-unit.source: You do not have permission to access this page.
trans-unit.target: Du har ikke tilladelse til at få adgang til denne side.

trans-unit.source: You do not have permission to access this page
trans-unit.target: Du har ikke tilladelse til at få adgang til denne side

trans-unit.source: Activate the permission system for authors.

trans-unit.target: Tilladelser for artikler, kategorier og kommentarer
